response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack software craftsman with strong web/backend credentials, but the role requires native-level Japanese proficiency (a hard requirement) which is not indicated, and lacks the core embedded/networking security background: no C-for-UNIX production experience in recent years, no Linux kernel modification work, no LAN-switch/MACsec/802.1X/NETCONF/SNMP exposure, and no chip-vendor SDK or bootloader experience. The brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (2014-2015) is too dated and unrelated to embedded security.
strengths: 10+ years of professional software development experience across multiple stacks
Some historical C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a C IDE product
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, testing culture, open-source contributions
concerns: No evidence of native-level Japanese language proficiency (hard requirement)
No Linux kernel investigation/modification or embedded networking security experience (MACsec, 802.1X, switch chips)
Primary recent expertise is TypeScript/Node.js web platforms, not C-based embedded firmware

key_factors.factor: General software engineering depth and longevity
